_publications._publicationTitle: Patient-Derived Tumor Organoid Rings for Histologic Characterization and High-Throughput Screening

_contextSnippet: When using an EpMotion, try to apply more pressure to make sure that the tips can reach the center wells, then gently release the plate holder. Visually inspect the plate and repeat until all liquid is gone.
details: When using automated liquid handlers (e.g., EpMotion) for media exchange or ATP assay steps in 96-well plates, residual liquid may remain in center wells; apply additional tip pressure to reach center well bottoms and visually inspect after aspiration, repeating until all liquid is removed
